title: Thirudiya Idhayathai Song Lyrics Paarvai Ondre Podhume
stanzas:
Thirudiya Idhayathai Song Lyrics Paarvai Ondre Podhume
#Bharani

sirikkira sirippai niruthividu,
paarkkira paarvaiyai marandhuvidu,
paesia paechai niruthividu,
pennae, ennai marandhuvidu,
uyirae, marandhuvidu,
uravae marandhuvidu,
anbae vilagividu,
ennai vaazha vidu,

kaatraai maari kaadhalikkiraen
kannae oru murai swaasam kol
naanum unnai samandhikkiraen
endrae indoru vaarthai sol
mannavannae, mannavannae
uyiril uyiraai kalandhavanae

idhayathodu idhayam saerthu,
oru murai aavadhu poottikol,
kangalodu kangal vaithu,
oru murai aavadhu paarthukol,

enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the meaning of the song 'Thirudiya Idhayathai'?

The song conveys deep emotions of love and longing, reflecting on the complexities of relationships.

What is the context of this song in the movie 'Paarvai Ondre Podhume'?

In the movie, this song highlights a pivotal moment of emotional connection between the lead characters.

Who is the singer and music director of this song?

The song is sung by Harish Ragavendra and composed by Bharani.

When was 'Thirudiya Idhayathai' released?

The song was released on March 16, 2001.
enrichedMetadata.summary: In Thirudiya Idhayathai, the protagonist expresses profound feelings of love and nostalgia, beautifully encapsulated through the lyrics penned by Pa Vijay. The song serves as a backdrop to a significant emotional moment in Paarvai Ondre Podhume, where the characters reflect on their relationship. Harish Ragavendra's soulful rendition, combined with Bharani's melodic composition, evokes a sense of longing and tenderness. This track resonates with anyone who has experienced the highs and lows of love.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Thirudiya Idhayathai from Paarvai Ondre Podhume is a mesmerizing melody that captures the essence of love and longing. With Harish Ragavendra's soulful voice and Bharani's enchanting composition, this song resonates deeply with anyone who has experienced the bittersweet emotions of romance. Dive into a world of nostalgia and heartfelt lyrics that will leave you yearning for more.
stanzaMeanings: Stealing my heart, give it back, my love, my love,
To the passing breeze, speak words, my love, my love,
Stop the smiling laughter, forget the gaze, stop the talk, girl, forget me, my life, forget me, our bond forgets, love separates, let me live,
Stealing my heart, give it back, my love, my love,
Is this love that has come from the eyes? Did I think of it, did I think of it?
With a sharp tongue, you speak love, did I err, did I err?
Changing the breeze, I am loving you, my eyes, with one breath I connect with you, this one word, oh my dear, oh my dear, you and I are one in life,
Stealing my heart, give it back, my love, my love,
Yesterday's moment, I saw a dream, I saw you, I saw you,
In the age of love, I am something without your memory, I am hurt, I am hurt,
With the heart joining with the heart, once let it be embraced, with the eyes holding the eyes, once let it be seen,
Oh love, oh love, is life living for you?
Stealing my heart, give it back, my love, my love,
